title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A deep dive on designing multi-agent systems that minimize LLM calls by using deterministic logic for problems like route planning. The core insight is using a before_model_callback to skip the LLM where code is more efficient, demonstrated on a 1000-agent marathon simulation that makes zero LLM calls for route planning.
